summary: Batch 2 KPI & Performance System testing complete. Backend API /api/admin/performance/dashboard verified (10/10 tests passed before rate limiting). Frontend Performance Dashboard at /admin/performance fully functional with KPI strip, channel bar, sales leaderboard (profit-first), affiliate leaderboard (earnings-only), action panel, and month/year filters. Settings Hub Performance Targets tab at /admin/settings-hub verified with all required fields.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Batch 2 KPI System verified. Key routes: (1) /api/admin/performance/dashboard - returns kpi_strip, channels, sales_leaderboard, affiliate_leaderboard, actions, targets. (2) /admin/performance - Performance Dashboard page. (3) /admin/settings-hub - Settings Hub with Performance Targets tab under Partner Policy group. Note: Rate limiting is aggressive (5 failed attempts triggers lockout). Use session reuse in tests.

details: GET /api/admin/performance/dashboard returns 200 with auth
Response has required fields: period, kpi_strip, channels, sales_leaderboard, affiliate_leaderboard, actions, targets
KPI strip includes: total_profit, target_profit, achievement_pct, total_revenue, active_sales, active_affiliates
Channels include: sales, affiliate, direct, group_deal with revenue, profit, target, achievement_pct, contribution_pct
Sales leaderboard: profit is PRIMARY column, revenue secondary, status (top/warning/underperform)
Affiliate leaderboard: earnings-only (NO revenue/profit/margin), deals, conversions, status
Actions panel: warnings + insights
Month/year filter works (?year=2026&month=4)
Unauthorized access rejected (401/403)
Page renders at /admin/performance
KPI cards: Total Profit, Achievement, Revenue, Active Sales, Active Affiliates
Channel bar shows split: Sales 2.4%, Affiliate 1.6%, Direct 86.5%, Group Deals 9.6%
Channel cards with revenue, profit, achievement %
Sales table headers: Name, Profit, Target, %, Revenue, Deals, Status (profit-first confirmed)
Affiliate table headers: Name, Earnings, Deals, Conversions, %, Status (earnings-only confirmed)
Action panel with 8 action items
Month/Year filters functional
Tab exists under Partner Policy group at /admin/settings-hub
Monthly Targets section: Monthly Revenue Target (TZS), Target Margin %
Auto-calculated Target Profit displayed
Channel Allocation: Sales %, Affiliate %, Direct %, Group Deals %
Total % validation (must equal 100%)
Team Size & KPI Thresholds: Sales Staff Count, Affiliate Count, Sales Min KPI %, Affiliate Min KPI %
Per-person targets auto-calculated and displayed
Mobile card layouts exist in code (data-testid='sales-mobile-cards', 'affiliate-mobile-cards')
Could not verify due to session timeout during mobile viewport test

rate_limiting_note: Backend has aggressive rate limiting (5 failed login attempts triggers lockout). Initial test run passed 10/10 tests. Subsequent runs hit rate limit. Tests are valid - rate limiting is working as expected security feature.
